name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix together thoroughly the butter, shortening, and 1 1/2 cups sugar.
3. Add the eggs and mix well.
4. Blend in the flour, cream of tartar, soda, and salt.
5. Shape dough into rounded teaspoonfuls and place about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Mix together 2 tablespoons sugar and the cinnamon.
7. Roll each ball in the cinnamon mixture.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from the baking sheet immediately.
